title: Tuition & FAQ
intro: Transparent pricing and answers to the questions we hear most.

content.p: Tuition is billed monthly and covers weekly classes for the full season (September through May). Registration is $35 per family per year. Financial aid is available — just ask.

ul: 1 class per week — $78 / month
2 classes per week — $146 / month
3 classes per week — $204 / month
4 classes per week — $252 / month
Unlimited classes — $310 / month
Adult drop-in — $22 / class
Private lesson (30 min) — $45
Private lesson (60 min) — $80
Sibling discount — 10% off the second dancer
Costume fee (per production) — $65
What should my child wear? — A leotard, tights, and hair in a bun; shoe requirements are listed per class.
Do you offer trial classes? — Yes, the first class in any level is free.
When are the performances? — A winter showcase in December and a full production in May.
Is there a recital fee? — The costume fee above covers it; tickets are sold separately.
Can adults start as beginners? — Absolutely — Adult Open Ballet and drop-ins welcome all levels.
What is your make-up policy? — Missed classes may be made up in a comparable level within 30 days.
Do you close for holidays? — We follow the local school district calendar; closures are posted each term.
How do I withdraw? — Email us 30 days before the next billing cycle; no penalty.
Is parking free? — Yes, in the rear lot off 2nd Street.
How do I register? — Use the Classes tab to find a class, then contact the front desk to enroll.
